problem: What membrane material filters all contaminants from water at low energy cost?
mechanism: Metal-organic framework with specific pore geometry
hypothesis: Metal-organic framework with specific pore geometry may resolve What membrane material filters all contaminants from water at low energy cost? by activating at the molecular level.

experiment.protocol: Synthesis and characterization with 36 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
